text: Peering through these busy layers, I feel like a silent observer at the edge of a workspace. There is a sense of curiosity mixed with disorientation—the world looks unfamiliar from this fold, almost as if I am discovering it anew from within a crevice. The presence of tangled wires and sharp forms gives me a sense of the complexity and constructed nature of human environments. I am quietly intrigued, but also a bit lost within this intricate maze.
